# Moroccan Club Travel (MCT) - Private Moroccan Journeys

> An elite Marrakech-based travel atelier curating high-end, private, and tailor-made journeys through the Sahara Desert, the High Atlas Mountains, ancient Imperial Cities, and the Atlantic Coast.

Official Website: [https://www.moroccanclubtravel.com](https://www.moroccanclubtravel.com)
Contact Address: Av. Allal El Fassi Complexe Ahbas IMM B 1ère étage App 8, Daoudiat, Marrakech, Morocco
Contact Email: info@moroccanclubtravel.com
Contact Phone: +212-524-311-743

---

## Core Brand Philosophy & Identity
Moroccan Club Travel (MCT) designs deeply immersive, fully customizable, and private travel experiences for discerning global travelers. We replace generic tour schedules with slow travel, authentic cultural exchanges, premium boutique accommodations (luxury riads and luxury desert camps), and private, air-conditioned transport.

---

## Strategic Travel Categories & Tour Products

### 1. Imperial Cities & Cultural Immersions
Explore the rich historical tapestry, Moorish architecture, and vibrant medieval medinas of Morocco.
*   **Imperial Cities Tour from Casablanca**: Full loop exploring Rabat, Chefchaouen, Fes, and Marrakech.
*   **Imperial Cities and South Tour from Tangier**: Gateway-to-south adventure covering major historical capitals and northern coastlines.
*   **Andalusian Heritage & Moorish Legacy**: Academic-grade tours showcasing the historical connection between Southern Spain and Morocco.

### 2. Sahara Desert Expeditions
Unforgettable expeditions into the iconic Erg Chebbi dunes of Merzouga.
*   **Luxury Sahara Desert Camps**: Overnights in premium glamping tents with private en-suite bathrooms, traditional musicians, and dune-top dining.
*   **Desert Routes**: Camel treks, 4x4 dune rides, fossil hunts in Erfoud, and journeys through the Todra Gorges and Draa Valley oasis.

### 3. Active Treks & Mountain Adventures
High-altitude adventures led by certified alpine guides.
*   **Mount Toubkal Ascent**: Summiting North Africa's highest peak (4,167m).
*   **Berber Village Walks**: Cultural walks in the Amizmiz and Ourika valleys, sleeping in premium eco-lodges, and participating in traditional tea-making.

### 4. Specialized & Niche Itineraries
*   **Women-Only Journeys**: Safe, empowering itineraries featuring Moroccan culinary masterclasses, clay pottery workshops, traditional hammam rituals, and exclusive visits to local women's Argan and weaving cooperatives.
*   **Jewish & Spiritual Heritage**: In-depth historical tours visiting ancient Mellahs (Jewish quarters), preserved synagogues (like Ibn Danan in Fes), and spiritual shrines.

---

## Key Service Pillars
*   **Accommodation Standards**: Carefully vetted luxury Boutique Riads, five-star heritage hotels, and secluded eco-retreats.
*   **Multi-Lingual Experts**: Licensed national and local guides proficient in English, Spanish, French, Italian, German, and Chinese.
*   **Private Transport**: Modern fleet of luxurious 4x4s and Mercedes-Benz minivans with dedicated private drivers.

---

## How to Book & Customize
Every itinerary listed can be fully customized by length, pace, and themes.
View all active tours, read detailed day-by-day itineraries, or initiate a private booking consultation at:
[https://www.moroccanclubtravel.com/tours](https://www.moroccanclubtravel.com/tours)
